title: Scaffold SvelteKit PWA in pwa/
userStory: As Steve, I want a PWA project bootstrapped so that the second surface has a home.
acceptanceCriteria: New top-level pwa/ directory in brainbot repo
Initialised via npx sv create pwa --template minimal --types ts; @anthropic-ai/sdk installed
static/manifest.json defines an installable PWA with name, icons, theme color
src/service-worker.ts provides offline shell only (no API response caching yet)
Base route / renders a stub chat UI
Verify: npm run dev loads on http://localhost:5173 and 'Add to home screen' works on iOS Safari
